extension.summary: Syncher - Scene Release Streamer with Debrid, Trakt, Music via Deezer
extension.description: Syncher v3.2.0 by zeus768 - Browse Movies, TV Shows, Sports Highlights and Music. Scrapes scene release sites (RapidRAR, PSA, RapidMoviez, TFPDL, WatchSeriesHD, RLSbb, DDLValley, SceneSource) plus sports replay sites. NEW: Rich Music section powered by Deezer API with genres, artists, albums, charts, curated playlists, user-created playlists, autoplay, and music torrent scene search. Resolves links through Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox and RapidRAR premium. Trakt integration for browsing, watchlists, scrobbling. TMDB metadata with posters, cast, directors.
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content. A debrid service or RapidRAR.cr premium account is recommended.
extension.news:
v3.2.0 (2026) - NEW: Rich Music section with Deezer API integration - Music genres, artists, albums, top charts, curated playlists - Artist pages with top tracks, albums, related artists - Album view with track listing and auto-play all - User-created playlists with add/remove tracks - Music scene site search (RLSbb, DDLValley, SceneSource, PSA) - Auto-play mode for albums and playlists via scene torrent sources
v3.1.1 (2026) - Version bump and metadata updates
v2.0.1 (2026) - FIXED: Icon and fanart now display correctly in Kodi repo browser
v2.0.0 (2026) - Initial release by zeus768 - Trakt API powered browsing (Movies, TV Shows, Sports, Music) - TMDB metadata enrichment (posters, cast, directors, fanart) - Scene scrapers: RapidRAR, PSA, RapidMoviez, TFPDL, WatchSeriesHD, RLSbb, DDLValley, SceneSource - Sports replay scrapers: Sport-Video, FullMatchShows, FootballOrgin, Basketball-Video - Debrid resolvers: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox (device code auth) - RapidRAR.cr premium resolver with login - Trakt authorization with device code - Warez site login support (per-site credentials) - Favourites, Search, Trakt Lists
